chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S-218 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For orders on M.A 694/19 3. For hearing of main case 16.08.2019. Mr. Ahsan Gul Dahri, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G. along with DSP Abdul Hakeem Mazari, SDPO Daulatpur, Inspector Ghulam Asghar Awan, S.H.O P.S Daulatpur, Inspector Samiullah Panhwar, P.S A- Section, Nawabshah, and ASI Nazar Muhammad P.S Pubjo. -.-.-. Petitioner claims to be president, All Pakistan Oil Tanker Owners Association, and is alleging harassment by respondents police officials over activities of Association being conducted at its Office situated in Daulatpur, Taluka Qazi Ahmed. On the other hand, learned Additional Advocate General Sindh and DSP Abdul Hakeem Mazari, SDPO Daulatpur, Inspector Ghulam Asghar Awan, S.H.O P.S Daulatpur, Inspector Samiullah Panhwar, P.S A-Section, Nawabshah, and ASI Nazar Muhammad P.S Pubjo submit that due to activities of petitioner association, often law and order situation is created as two parallel associations of Oil Tankers are being run which do not see eye to eye on running of association’s affairs, people face inconvenience due to parking of Oil Tankers on roads, and that they receive complaints that petitioner association is charging illegal dues from each Oil Tanker which arrives at P.S.O Petrol Pump situated outside Daulatpur or at other designated places for filling purpose. However, these allegations have been refuted by learned counsel for petitioner. Needless to say, this court cannot decide factual controversy between the parties and therefore, this petition is disposed of along with listed application with observation that the police officials shall act in accordance with law and do not cause harassment, if any, to the petitioner association’s lawful activities.

However, these allegations have been refuted by learned counsel for petitioner. Needless to say, this court cannot decide factual controversy between the parties and therefore, this petition is disposed of along with listed application with observation that the police officials shall act in accordance with law and do not cause harassment, if any, to the petitioner association’s lawful activities. However, if any law and order situation is created as alleged or there is a dispute between different associations on any issue, or the Oil Tankers are parked on the roads or in the area except the one designated for this purpose, there is any complaint of overcharging from Oil Tankers by the petitioner’s association, etc. the police would be competent to take action in accordance with law against the responsible. JUDGE Ali Haider
